headline: Qualcomm Stock Jumps 11% – Here’s Why It’s Still Down 13% in 2026
summary: Shares of Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) are surging in Friday midday trading, up roughly 11% as the semiconductor complex catches fire. The stock last changed hands near $148.28, after closing Thursday at $133.95. That’s a sharp one-day reversal for one of the weakest large-cap chip names of the year. Today’s catalyst is sector-wide rather than company-specific. Intel ... Qualcomm Stock Jumps 11% – Here’s Why It’s Still Down 13% in 2026
